assertions.title: Feature prompts are self-contained worker assignments

steps.action: Create mission with plan containing special characters

steps.observed: Skill file created with worker instructions

steps.action: Run feature prompt command with --out flag

steps.observed: Feature assignment, mission context, milestone context, verification expectations, and SKILL.md content all present

steps.action: Verify files written to both locations

commands.command: bun run src/index.ts feature prompt f1 --mission 2026-03-30-003 --out /tmp/test-mission-cli/prompt-out.md

assertions.title: Missing worker skills fail with actionable hints

steps.action: Run feature prompt for feature with non-existent worker type
steps.observed: Error: No skill found for worker type "missing-worker"

steps.action: Verify error message indicates where to create skill file

evidence.consoleErrors: Error: No skill found for worker type "missing-worker". Create .maestro/skills/missing-worker/SKILL.md to add this worker type.

commands.command: bun run src/index.ts feature prompt f2 --mission 2026-03-30-003

assertions.title: Prompt composition preserves literal user content

steps.action: Create mission with markdown fences, braces, and special characters
steps.observed: Mission created with special content preserved

steps.action: Generate prompt and verify special content is literal
steps.expected: Content appears literally without breaking template

steps.observed: Mission context, milestone context, feature assignment, verification steps all present and correctly ordered

commands.command: bun run src/index.ts mission create --file plan.json --json
bun run src/index.ts feature prompt f1 --mission 2026-03-30-003 --out prompt-out.md

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-FEATURE-003 confirmed prompt generation writes to both requested path and workers/{featureId}/prompt.md with all required sections. VAL-FEATURE-004 confirmed missing worker skills produce actionable MaestroError with path hints. VAL-FEATURE-005 confirmed markdown fences, braces, and template-like content are treated as literal and do not break prompt structure.
